citation: Republic Act No. 9711 — Section 10 (Prohibited acts in advertising health products)
summary: Advertising must not imply therapeutic, medicinal, or disease-related effects for non-drug products, including implied health outcomes from general consumer goods.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Implied wellness, healing, immunity, or disease-risk reduction from non-supplement consumer products (Tagalog or English). ACTION: WARN with HIGH severity — treat health implication strictly; apply PH enforcement-density confidence adjustment at fusion layer. CHECK: Product category, registered claims, and implied vs express wording. ESCALATE IF: Drug-like cure, treatment, or prevention implied.
